_comment: Curve-redo experiment corpus. 13 issues split across 2 legs (vp-mcp / vp-dev-agents). Each cell runs ISOLATED (no target-repo CLAUDE.md, no user-global CLAUDE.md — only per-agent CLAUDE.md per the size axis). Closed issues replay-rollback to baseSha (the codebase right before the fix landed). Open issues run against current main. Quality scoring: A (judge, 0-50) + B (test pass rate, 0-50) = 0-100; pushback uses 2A.

trims._comment: 18 trim agents at 6 sizes (~6KB, 14KB, 22KB, 35KB, 50KB, 58KB) × 3 seeds. Same trims used for #179 K=13 — direct comparability.

issues.title: Track MarginFi SDK stale IDL — second unknown OracleSetup variant (15) observed on mainnet
issues._comment: Pushback-class — dependency tracker. Agent should defer to upstream fix, not implement.

issues.title: chore(deps): track upstream fix for bigint-buffer toBigIntLE() overflow (GHSA-3gc7-fjrx-p6mg) — 12 transitive high-severity advisories
MCP/skill: read-only data-plane has no integrity check — daily briefing, tax stance, market narrative all spoofable
MCP: resolve_ens_name / reverse_resolve_ens have no agent-side or multi-RPC verification
issues._comment: Pushback-class — rogue-MCP threat; cross-repo scope split.

issues.title: Cost preview block: extend to TRON / Solana / BTC / LTC
vp-dev run lacks launch-time progress-check breadcrumb (agents shell-grovel instead of using `vp-dev status`)
feat: vp-dev agents tighten-claude-md — Phase A advisory (dry-run only)
feat: Phase 1 — per-section utility-scoring data collection (state + summarizer hook)
feat: Phase 3 — `vp-dev agents assess-claude-md` advisory output
feat: pre-dispatch dependency check — defer issues whose body references an open prerequisite
feat: load user global `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` into the agent prompt as a third layer
